arts.ttl: Tonali can bring much-needed energy to Newcastle midfield
arts.sum: Tonali's average speed of 7.28km/h was by far the highest of any Newcastle player in that match and his 124 intensive sprints were the most made while he was on the pitch. He averaged 12km per 90 minutes during the early stage of 2023/24, while also making more sprints and pressures than any other player in the Newcastle midfield.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United activate recruitment plan to resolve Eddie Howe and Paul Mitchell tensions
arts.sum: Howe could have ignored some of Mitchell's remarks about the scouting set-up at Newcastle United when asked on Friday but did not hold back when giving a perfectly reasonable response to the former Monaco's supremo's view that the recruitment department was not "fit for purpose". But it has to be collaboration, that's the key thing, giving your views together for the best thing for the football club.

arts.ttl: Gary O'Neil gushes over Newcastle United star as Wolves target Premier League revival
arts.sum: Wolves boss Gary O'Neil is acutely aware of the danger Isak and Newcastle will pose as they look to move out of the Premier League relegation zone after recording just one point from three matches so far. Newcastle United talisman Alexander Isak has been singled out for special praise on the eve of the Magpies trip to Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed as Eddie Howe has big decisions to make for Wolves
arts.sum: The 24-year-old has not started a Premier League game for United since last October, but could come into the side today. Eddie Howe has no new injury concerns for today's Premier League clash with Wolves at Molineux, but has only been able to add one more player to his squad.

arts.ttl: Is Wolves vs Newcastle United on TV, what time is kick-off and how to stream it
arts.sum: Newcastle United return to Premier League action today looking to build on their positive start to the season. Howe has Fabian Schar available today after he completed a three-match ban, while Sandro Tonali could come in for his first league start since last October.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon told to ‘maximise every moment’ by Newcastle boss Eddie Howe
arts.sum: The 23-year-old started both of England’s Nations League games.

arts.ttl: Newcastle freezing out £20m player just months after signing him
arts.sum: Oydsseas Vlachodimos is set to be frozen out of Newcastle United’s squad despite only joining the club this summer, according to reports. The Greek stopper became Newcastle’s most expensive-ever goalkeeper when he arrived from Nottingham Forest for £20m. However, the move was always a strange one given Nick Pope’s status as undisputed No.1 at St. […] The post Newcastle freezing out £20m player just months after signing him appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's 'decisive' role as Newcastle United beat Serie A teams to transfer
arts.sum: As clubs on the continent queued up an attractive free transfer, Eddie Howe played a crucial role in ensuring the versatile defender chose Newcastle over all other options. That's according to Andrea Pellegatti, an agent on the inside of the deal to take the defender to St James' Park at the start of the summer window.

arts.ttl: Wolves sweat over the fitness of key trio for crunch Newcastle United clash
arts.sum: “We have an incredibly tough run of fixtures – we have to get stuck in, not many people outside of Wolves will give us much chance in any of them," said O'Neil. O'Neil has challenged his Wanderers squad to ‘get stuck in’ following a t ricky opening run of fixtures.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Newcastle to go head-to-head for "big-money" Bayern attacker?
arts.sum: Premier League rivals Arsenal and Newcastle United are reportedly considering a potential big-money move for Bayern Munich star Leroy Sane.
